## Work Experience

**Academic Intern (Reader) – STAT 20**  
University of California, Berkeley | Jan 2026 – Present  

- Grade quizzes, assignments, labs, and exams for an introductory statistics course focused on data analysis using R.  
- Review and troubleshoot R-based course materials and coding exercises prior to distribution to students.  
- Support course instruction by ensuring accuracy of statistical content and providing feedback on data analysis workflows.


**Research Assistant**  
Global Environmental Health Solutions Lab, University of California, Berkeley | Dec 2025 – Present  

- Process and analyze high-frequency environmental sensor data from household monitoring systems to study heat exposure patterns.
- Perform data cleaning, preprocessing, and integration of large-scale longitudinal datasets using R.  
- Conduct exploratory data analysis and visualization in R to examine temporal trends and data quality.    
- Collaborate with researchers using mixed R and Python workflows for data processing and analysis.
